en.description: Sirius is the brightest star in the night sky, located in the constellation Canis Major at just 8.6 light-years from Earth. It is a binary star system — Sirius A is a main-sequence star about twice the mass and 25 times the luminosity of the Sun, while its companion Sirius B is a white dwarf roughly the size of Earth but with a mass close to the Sun. The intense blue-white light of Sirius has made it one of the most culturally significant stars in human history, used for navigation and timekeeping by numerous civilizations. During summer in the northern hemisphere, Sirius rises with the Sun — the origin of the phrase 'dog days of summer'.
facts: Brightest star in the night sky with apparent magnitude -1.46
Binary system: Sirius A (main sequence) + Sirius B (white dwarf companion)
Distance: 8.6 light-years — one of the closest stars to Earth
Sirius A is about twice the mass and 25 times more luminous than the Sun
Sirius B is a white dwarf roughly the size of Earth but with near-solar mass
The 'dog days of summer' phrase originated from Sirius rising with the Sun in summer
Ancient Egyptians used Sirius's heliacal rising to predict the annual flooding of the Nile
Sirius appears to twinkle more than other stars due to atmospheric refraction of its intense light
en.mythology: Sirius was one of the most important stars in ancient mythology. The ancient Egyptians called it Sopdet (Greek: Sothis) and associated it with the goddess Isis. Its heliacal rising — when Sirius first becomes visible just before sunrise — marked the beginning of the Egyptian new year and predicted the annual flooding of the Nile, which was crucial for agriculture. In Greek and Roman tradition, Sirius was the eye of Canis Major, the Greater Dog, the faithful hunting dog of the mythological hunter Orion. The star's intense summer appearance was blamed for heat waves, drought, and fever — hence the 'dog days of summer'. The Dogon people of Mali also have ancient astronomical knowledge of Sirius and its invisible companion, predating modern telescopic discovery.

id.description: Sirius adalah bintang paling terang di langit malam, terletak di konstelasi Canis Major hanya 8,6 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah sistem bintang biner — Sirius A adalah bintang deret utama dengan massa sekitar dua kali dan luminositas 25 kali Matahari, sementara pendampingnya Sirius B adalah katai putih berukuran kira-kira sebesar Bumi tetapi dengan massa mendekati Matahari. Cahaya biru-putih intens Sirius menjadikannya salah satu bintang paling penting secara budaya dalam sejarah manusia, digunakan untuk navigasi dan penentuan waktu oleh berbagai peradaban. Selama musim panas di belahan bumi utara, Sirius terbit bersama Matahari — asal mula ungkapan 'hari-hari anjing musim panas'.
facts: Bintang paling terang di langit malam dengan magnitudo tampak -1,46
Sistem biner: Sirius A (deret utama) + Sirius B (pendamping katai putih)
Jarak: 8,6 tahun cahaya — salah satu bintang terdekat dari Bumi
Sirius A sekitar dua kali massa Matahari dan 25 kali lebih terang
Sirius B adalah katai putih berukuran kira-kira Bumi tetapi dengan massa hampir setara Matahari
Ungkapan 'hari-hari anjing musim panas' berasal dari Sirius yang terbit bersama Matahari di musim panas
Orang Mesir kuno menggunakan terbitnya Sirius untuk memprediksi banjir tahunan Sungai Nil
Sirius tampak berkelip lebih banyak dari bintang lain karena refraksi atmosfer dari cahayanya yang intens
id.mythology: Sirius adalah salah satu bintang terpenting dalam mitologi kuno. Orang Mesir kuno menyebutnya Sopdet (Yunani: Sothis) dan mengaitkannya dengan dewi Isis. Terbitnya Sirius heliakal — saat Sirius pertama kali terlihat tepat sebelum matahari terbit — menandai awal tahun baru Mesir dan memprediksi banjir tahunan Sungai Nil. Dalam tradisi Yunani dan Romawi, Sirius adalah mata Canis Major, Anjing Besar, anjing pemburu setia dari pemburu mitologis Orion. Penampilan intens Sirius di musim panas disalahkan atas gelombang panas, kekeringan, dan demam. Suku Dogon dari Mali juga memiliki pengetahuan astronomi kuno tentang Sirius dan pendampingnya yang tak terlihat, mendahului penemuan teleskop modern.

en.description: Canopus is the second-brightest star in the night sky, located in the southern constellation Carina at a distance of about 310 light-years. It is a bright giant or supergiant star, roughly 65 times the mass of the Sun and an astonishing 13,300 times more luminous. Despite its brilliance, Canopus is rarely seen from northern latitudes because of its far southern position in the sky. For centuries it has been used for spacecraft navigation — many NASA and ESA probes use Canopus as a reference star for attitude control. It lies too far south to have featured prominently in ancient Greek mythology, but was important to Egyptian, Arab, and Polynesian navigators.
facts: Second-brightest star in the night sky with apparent magnitude -0.74
Located 310 light-years away in the southern constellation Carina
About 65 solar masses and 13,300 times more luminous than the Sun
Too far south to be visible from most of Europe and northern USA
Widely used as a navigation reference star by spacecraft attitude control systems
Canopus is a bright yellow-white supergiant of spectral type A9II
Ancient Egyptians and Polynesian navigators used Canopus for celestial navigation
Its great luminosity and distance mean it would outshine a full moon if moved to 4 light-years away
en.mythology: Canopus was named after the chief navigator of the fleet of Menelaus, king of Sparta, in Greek mythology. Canopus the navigator allegedly died and was buried in Egypt, near where the star is most prominently seen. In ancient Egypt, the star was associated with the god Osiris and represented the south. The city of Canopus in ancient Egypt was named after this star. Arab astronomers called it Suhayl, a name still used in Arabic-speaking countries. For Polynesian navigators, Canopus — known as Atutahi or Aotearoa — was considered the first star to emerge from the primordial darkness and was a crucial wayfinding star for trans-oceanic voyages across the Pacific.

id.description: Canopus adalah bintang paling terang kedua di langit malam, terletak di konstelasi selatan Carina pada jarak sekitar 310 tahun cahaya. Ini adalah bintang raksasa terang atau supergiant, sekitar 65 kali massa Matahari dan 13.300 kali lebih terang. Meski sangat cemerlang, Canopus jarang terlihat dari lintang utara karena posisinya yang sangat selatan. Selama berabad-abad digunakan untuk navigasi pesawat ruang angkasa — banyak wahana NASA dan ESA menggunakan Canopus sebagai bintang referensi untuk kontrol orientasi.
facts: Bintang paling terang kedua di langit malam dengan magnitudo tampak -0,74
Terletak 310 tahun cahaya di konstelasi selatan Carina
Sekitar 65 massa surya dan 13.300 kali lebih terang dari Matahari
Terlalu jauh ke selatan untuk terlihat dari sebagian besar Eropa dan Amerika Utara
Banyak digunakan sebagai bintang referensi navigasi oleh sistem kontrol orientasi pesawat ruang angkasa
Canopus adalah supergiant kuning-putih terang bertipe spektral A9II
Orang Mesir kuno dan navigator Polinesia menggunakan Canopus untuk navigasi langit
Luminositasnya yang besar berarti jika dipindahkan ke 4 tahun cahaya, ia akan lebih terang dari bulan purnama
id.mythology: Canopus dinamai dari navigator utama armada Menelaus, raja Sparta, dalam mitologi Yunani. Navigator Canopus konon meninggal dan dimakamkan di Mesir, dekat tempat bintang ini paling menonjol terlihat. Di Mesir kuno, bintang ini dikaitkan dengan dewa Osiris dan melambangkan selatan. Kota Canopus di Mesir kuno dinamai dari bintang ini. Astronom Arab menyebutnya Suhayl, nama yang masih digunakan di negara-negara berbahasa Arab. Bagi navigator Polinesia, Canopus — dikenal sebagai Atutahi — dianggap sebagai bintang pertama yang muncul dari kegelapan primordial dan merupakan bintang penunjuk arah krusial untuk pelayaran trans-Pasifik.

en.description: Arcturus is the brightest star in the northern celestial hemisphere and the fourth-brightest star in the night sky overall, located in the constellation Boötes at 36.7 light-years from Earth. It is a red giant star, about 25 times the diameter of the Sun, and approximately 170 times more luminous. Arcturus is notable for its high proper motion — it is moving unusually fast across the sky relative to other stars, suggesting it belongs to a different stellar population that entered the Milky Way's disk from a satellite galaxy billions of years ago. It was the first star (other than the Sun) to have its light used to open a World's Fair, powering floodlights at the 1933 Chicago World's Fair.
facts: Brightest star in the northern sky; fourth-brightest overall at magnitude -0.05
Red giant approximately 25 times the Sun's diameter and 170 times more luminous
Distance: 36.7 light-years from Earth
Has unusually high proper motion — moving ~2.3 arcseconds per year across the sky
Likely originated from an ancient satellite galaxy that merged with the Milky Way
Its light was used to open the 1933 Chicago World's Fair via a photocell relay
Arcturus will eventually collapse into a white dwarf after its red giant phase
One of the easiest stars to find — follow the arc of the Big Dipper's handle to Arcturus
en.mythology: Arcturus means 'Guardian of the Bear' in Greek, derived from 'arktos' (bear) and 'ouros' (guardian). In Greek mythology, Arcturus was associated with Arcas, the son of Zeus and the nymph Callisto. Zeus transformed Callisto into a bear, and when Arcas nearly killed his own mother without recognizing her, Zeus placed them both in the sky as Ursa Major (the bear) and Boötes (the guardian). The star Arcturus marks the brightest point of this guardian figure watching over the bears. In Polynesian tradition, Arcturus — known as Hokule'a — was the zenith star for Hawaii and guided ancient navigators on trans-Pacific voyages. The Polynesian Voyaging Society used this star to navigate the famous Hokule'a canoe journeys.

id.description: Arcturus adalah bintang paling terang di belahan langit utara dan bintang paling terang keempat di langit malam secara keseluruhan, terletak di konstelasi Boötes pada 36,7 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah bintang raksasa merah, sekitar 25 kali diameter Matahari, dan sekitar 170 kali lebih terang. Arcturus dikenal karena gerak dirinya yang tinggi — bergerak dengan kecepatan tidak biasa melintasi langit, menunjukkan bahwa ia berasal dari populasi bintang berbeda yang memasuki cakram Bima Sakti dari galaksi satelit miliaran tahun lalu.
facts: Bintang paling terang di langit utara; paling terang keempat secara keseluruhan pada magnitudo -0,05
Raksasa merah sekitar 25 kali diameter Matahari dan 170 kali lebih terang
Jarak: 36,7 tahun cahaya dari Bumi
Memiliki gerak diri yang tidak biasa tinggi — bergerak ~2,3 detik busur per tahun melintasi langit
Kemungkinan berasal dari galaksi satelit kuno yang bergabung dengan Bima Sakti
Cahayanya digunakan untuk membuka World's Fair Chicago 1933 melalui relai sel foto
Arcturus akhirnya akan runtuh menjadi katai putih setelah fase raksasa merahnya
Salah satu bintang paling mudah ditemukan — ikuti busur gagang Big Dipper menuju Arcturus
id.mythology: Arcturus berarti 'Penjaga Beruang' dalam bahasa Yunani, berasal dari 'arktos' (beruang) dan 'ouros' (penjaga). Dalam mitologi Yunani, Arcturus dikaitkan dengan Arcas, putra Zeus dan nimfa Callisto. Zeus mengubah Callisto menjadi beruang, dan ketika Arcas hampir membunuh ibunya sendiri tanpa mengenalinya, Zeus menempatkan keduanya di langit sebagai Ursa Major (beruang) dan Boötes (penjaga). Dalam tradisi Polinesia, Arcturus — dikenal sebagai Hokule'a — adalah bintang zenit untuk Hawaii dan memandu navigator kuno dalam pelayaran trans-Pasifik.

en.description: Vega is the brightest star in the constellation Lyra and the fifth-brightest star in the night sky, located just 25 light-years from Earth. It is a young, hot, blue-white star about 2.1 times the mass of the Sun and 40 times more luminous. Vega was the pole star around 12,000 years ago due to Earth's axial precession, and will become the pole star again around the year 13,727. It rotates extremely fast — completing one rotation every 12.5 hours — causing it to bulge at the equator and flatten at the poles. Vega was one of the first stars to be photographed and to have its spectrum recorded, making it a foundational reference star in modern astronomy.
facts: Fifth-brightest star in the night sky at magnitude 0.03
Distance: only 25 light-years from Earth
Was Earth's pole star ~12,000 years ago and will be again around 13,727 CE
Rotates once every 12.5 hours — extremely fast, causing equatorial bulge
Surrounded by a debris disk that may contain planets or proto-planetary material
One of the first stars to be photographed (1850) and have its spectrum recorded
Used as a primary calibration standard for stellar photometry
Part of the Summer Triangle asterism with Altair and Deneb
en.mythology: Vega's name comes from the Arabic 'waqi', meaning 'falling' or 'swooping', part of the phrase 'an-nasr al-waqi' — the falling eagle or vulture. In Arabic astronomy, Vega represented one of the two eagles (the other being Altair). In East Asian mythology, Vega (known as Zhinü, the Weaver Girl) is central to one of the most beloved star legends — the Qixi Festival. Zhinü was a fairy weaver who fell in love with Niulang (Altair), a cowherd. Separated by the Milky Way by the gods, they are only allowed to meet once a year when a bridge of magpies forms across the galaxy. This legend is still celebrated as the Chinese Valentine's Day.

id.description: Vega adalah bintang paling terang di konstelasi Lyra dan bintang paling terang kelima di langit malam, terletak hanya 25 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah bintang biru-putih yang muda dan panas, sekitar 2,1 kali massa Matahari dan 40 kali lebih terang. Vega adalah bintang kutub sekitar 12.000 tahun lalu akibat presesi sumbu Bumi, dan akan menjadi bintang kutub lagi sekitar tahun 13.727. Vega berputar sangat cepat — menyelesaikan satu rotasi setiap 12,5 jam — menyebabkan ia menggelembung di ekuator dan mendatar di kutub.
facts: Bintang paling terang kelima di langit malam pada magnitudo 0,03
Jarak: hanya 25 tahun cahaya dari Bumi
Adalah bintang kutub Bumi ~12.000 tahun lalu dan akan menjadi lagi sekitar 13.727 M
Berotasi sekali setiap 12,5 jam — sangat cepat, menyebabkan penggelembungan ekuatorial
Dikelilingi cakram puing yang mungkin mengandung planet atau materi proto-planet
Salah satu bintang pertama yang difoto (1850) dan direkam spektrumnya
Digunakan sebagai standar kalibrasi utama untuk fotometri bintang
Bagian dari asterisma Segitiga Musim Panas bersama Altair dan Deneb
id.mythology: Nama Vega berasal dari bahasa Arab 'waqi', berarti 'jatuh' atau 'menukik', bagian dari frasa 'an-nasr al-waqi' — elang atau burung nasar yang jatuh. Dalam mitologi Asia Timur, Vega (dikenal sebagai Zhinü, Gadis Penenun) adalah pusat salah satu legenda bintang paling dicintai — Festival Qixi. Zhinü adalah peri penenun yang jatuh cinta dengan Niulang (Altair), seorang gembala sapi. Dipisahkan oleh Bima Sakti oleh para dewa, mereka hanya diizinkan bertemu setahun sekali saat jembatan burung murai terbentuk melintasi galaksi. Legenda ini masih dirayakan sebagai Hari Valentine Tionghoa.

en.description: Rigel is the brightest star in the constellation Orion and the seventh-brightest star in the night sky, located approximately 860 light-years from Earth. Despite being labeled Beta Orionis, it outshines Alpha Orionis (Betelgeuse) most of the time. Rigel is a blue supergiant star roughly 21 times the mass of the Sun and an extraordinary 120,000 times more luminous — if it were as close as Sirius, it would cast visible shadows at night. Rigel is actually a multiple star system; its primary component has a companion, Rigel B, which is itself a binary. The star marks the left foot of Orion the Hunter in the classical depiction of the constellation.
facts: Seventh-brightest star in the night sky despite being labeled 'Beta' Orionis
Blue supergiant approximately 21 times the Sun's mass and 120,000 times more luminous
Distance: approximately 860 light-years from Earth
Part of a multiple star system — Rigel B is itself a binary pair
Marks the left foot of Orion the Hunter in the constellation
Surface temperature around 12,100 K — much hotter than the Sun's 5,778 K
Will likely end its life as a Type II supernova or collapse into a neutron star
One of the most luminous stars visible to the naked eye in our galaxy
en.mythology: Rigel's name comes from the Arabic 'Rijl Jauzah al-Yusra', meaning 'the left leg of the great one' — referring to its position at the foot of Orion. In Greek mythology, Orion was the greatest hunter who ever lived, son of the sea god Poseidon. He boasted he could kill any animal on Earth, angering the goddess Gaia, who sent a scorpion to kill him. Zeus immortalized both Orion and the scorpion (Scorpius) in the stars, placed on opposite sides of the sky so they never meet. Rigel, as Orion's foot, was part of this grand mythological narrative. In ancient Egypt, Rigel was associated with Sah, the god of the stars and father of Sopdu, connected to the concept of the soul's journey after death.

id.description: Rigel adalah bintang paling terang di konstelasi Orion dan bintang paling terang ketujuh di langit malam, terletak sekitar 860 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Meski berlabel Beta Orionis, ia mengalahkan kecerahan Alpha Orionis (Betelgeuse) hampir sepanjang waktu. Rigel adalah bintang supergiant biru sekitar 21 kali massa Matahari dan 120.000 kali lebih terang — jika sedekat Sirius, ia akan menciptakan bayangan yang terlihat di malam hari. Rigel sebenarnya adalah sistem bintang majemuk; komponen utamanya memiliki pendamping, Rigel B, yang sendiri merupakan bintang biner.
facts: Bintang paling terang ketujuh di langit malam meski berlabel 'Beta' Orionis
Supergiant biru sekitar 21 kali massa Matahari dan 120.000 kali lebih terang
Jarak: sekitar 860 tahun cahaya dari Bumi
Bagian dari sistem bintang majemuk — Rigel B sendiri adalah pasangan biner
Menandai kaki kiri Orion sang Pemburu di konstelasi
Suhu permukaan sekitar 12.100 K — jauh lebih panas dari Matahari (5.778 K)
Kemungkinan akan berakhir sebagai supernova Tipe II atau runtuh menjadi bintang neutron
Salah satu bintang paling terang yang terlihat mata telanjang di galaksi kita
id.mythology: Nama Rigel berasal dari bahasa Arab 'Rijl Jauzah al-Yusra', berarti 'kaki kiri sang agung' — merujuk pada posisinya di kaki Orion. Dalam mitologi Yunani, Orion adalah pemburu terhebat yang pernah hidup, putra dewa laut Poseidon. Ia menyombongkan diri bisa membunuh hewan apapun di Bumi, membuat murka dewi Gaia, yang mengirim kalajengking untuk membunuhnya. Zeus mengabadikan Orion dan kalajengking (Scorpius) di bintang-bintang, ditempatkan di sisi langit yang berlawanan. Di Mesir kuno, Rigel dikaitkan dengan Sah, dewa bintang dan ayah Sopdu, terhubung dengan konsep perjalanan jiwa setelah kematian.

en.description: Betelgeuse is one of the largest and most luminous stars visible to the naked eye, a red supergiant located in the constellation Orion approximately 548 light-years from Earth. Its diameter is roughly 700 times that of the Sun — if placed at the center of our solar system, it would engulf Mercury, Venus, Earth, and Mars. Betelgeuse is nearing the end of its life and will eventually explode as a Type II supernova, briefly becoming as bright as a full moon and visible in daylight. In late 2019 and early 2020, the star dimmed dramatically in what astronomers called the 'Great Dimming', caused by a massive surface mass ejection that created a dust cloud blocking its light.
facts: Red supergiant with diameter ~700 times the Sun — one of the largest known stars
Located ~548 light-years away in the constellation Orion
Will explode as a Type II supernova — potentially visible in daylight when it does
The 'Great Dimming' of 2019-2020 was caused by a massive stellar surface mass ejection
Surface temperature ~3,500 K — much cooler and redder than the Sun
Marks the right shoulder (upper left as seen from Earth) of Orion the Hunter
Name derives from Arabic 'Ibt al-Jauzah' — the armpit/shoulder of the central one
Betelgeuse pulsates irregularly, changing in brightness over cycles of ~400 days
en.mythology: Betelgeuse marks the right shoulder of Orion, the great hunter of Greek mythology. Orion was the son of the sea god Poseidon and was said to be the most handsome mortal alive. He fell in love with Artemis, goddess of the hunt, which angered her brother Apollo. Apollo tricked Artemis into shooting Orion with an arrow, and in her grief she placed him among the stars. In Arab tradition, the constellation was known as al-Jauzah — 'the central one' — and Betelgeuse (from 'ibt al-jauzah', the armpit) was one of its brightest markers. The Aztec and Mayan civilizations also tracked Betelgeuse, incorporating it into their agricultural and ceremonial calendars.

id.description: Betelgeuse adalah salah satu bintang terbesar dan paling terang yang terlihat mata telanjang, sebuah supergiant merah di konstelasi Orion sekitar 548 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Diameternya sekitar 700 kali Matahari — jika ditempatkan di pusat tata surya kita, ia akan menelan Merkurius, Venus, Bumi, dan Mars. Betelgeuse mendekati akhir hidupnya dan akhirnya akan meledak sebagai supernova Tipe II. Pada akhir 2019 dan awal 2020, bintang ini meredup dramatis dalam apa yang disebut 'Redupan Besar', disebabkan oleh ejeksi massa permukaan besar yang menciptakan awan debu yang menghalangi cahayanya.
facts: Supergiant merah dengan diameter ~700 kali Matahari — salah satu bintang terbesar yang diketahui
Terletak ~548 tahun cahaya di konstelasi Orion
Akan meledak sebagai supernova Tipe II — berpotensi terlihat di siang hari saat terjadi
'Redupan Besar' 2019-2020 disebabkan oleh ejeksi massa permukaan bintang yang masif
Suhu permukaan ~3.500 K — jauh lebih dingin dan lebih merah dari Matahari
Menandai bahu kanan Orion sang Pemburu
Nama berasal dari bahasa Arab 'Ibt al-Jauzah' — ketiak/bahu sang pusat
Betelgeuse berdenyut secara tidak teratur, berubah kecerahan dalam siklus ~400 hari
id.mythology: Betelgeuse menandai bahu kanan Orion, pemburu agung dalam mitologi Yunani. Orion adalah putra dewa laut Poseidon dan disebut sebagai manusia fana paling tampan yang pernah hidup. Ia jatuh cinta dengan Artemis, dewi perburuan, yang membuat Apollo marah. Apollo menipu Artemis agar memanah Orion, dan dalam kesedihannya ia menempatkan Orion di antara bintang-bintang. Dalam tradisi Arab, konstelasi ini dikenal sebagai al-Jauzah — 'sang pusat' — dan Betelgeuse (dari 'ibt al-jauzah', ketiak) adalah salah satu penandanya yang paling terang.

en.description: Procyon is the brightest star in the constellation Canis Minor and the eighth-brightest star in the night sky, located only 11.5 light-years from Earth — one of our closest stellar neighbors. Like Sirius, it is a binary system: Procyon A is a main-sequence star about 1.5 times the mass of the Sun, while Procyon B is a white dwarf companion. The name Procyon comes from Greek meaning 'before the dog', because in ancient times it rose just before Sirius (the Dog Star) in the night sky. Procyon forms part of the Winter Triangle asterism along with Sirius and Betelgeuse.
facts: Eighth-brightest star in the night sky at magnitude 0.34
Distance: only 11.5 light-years — one of the closest stars to Earth
Binary system: Procyon A (main sequence) + Procyon B (white dwarf)
Name means 'before the dog' in Greek — it rises just before Sirius
Forms the Winter Triangle asterism with Sirius and Betelgeuse
Procyon A is about 1.5 times the Sun's mass and 7 times more luminous
Procyon B was one of the first white dwarfs discovered (1896)
Will expand into a red giant in about 10 billion years
en.mythology: Procyon was the 'little dog star' in ancient Greek and Roman astronomy, representing the smaller of the two dogs following Orion the Hunter — Canis Minor, the lesser dog. Its name literally means 'before the dog', referring to how it rises slightly before Sirius (the main Dog Star, in Canis Major) in the night sky. In Egyptian astronomy, both dog stars — Sirius and Procyon — were important markers of the seasons. Some ancient sources associate Canis Minor with the dog Maera, belonging to Icarius, a mortal whom Dionysus taught to make wine. When Icarius was killed, his dog Maera led his daughter Erigone to the body; the gods immortalized the dog as Canis Minor.

id.description: Procyon adalah bintang paling terang di konstelasi Canis Minor dan bintang paling terang kedelapan di langit malam, terletak hanya 11,5 tahun cahaya dari Bumi — salah satu tetangga bintang terdekat kita. Seperti Sirius, ini adalah sistem biner: Procyon A adalah bintang deret utama sekitar 1,5 kali massa Matahari, sementara Procyon B adalah pendamping katai putih. Nama Procyon berasal dari bahasa Yunani yang berarti 'sebelum anjing', karena di zaman kuno ia terbit tepat sebelum Sirius.
facts: Bintang paling terang kedelapan di langit malam pada magnitudo 0,34
Jarak: hanya 11,5 tahun cahaya — salah satu bintang terdekat dari Bumi
Sistem biner: Procyon A (deret utama) + Procyon B (katai putih)
Nama berarti 'sebelum anjing' dalam bahasa Yunani — terbit tepat sebelum Sirius
Membentuk asterisma Segitiga Musim Dingin bersama Sirius dan Betelgeuse
Procyon A sekitar 1,5 kali massa Matahari dan 7 kali lebih terang
Procyon B adalah salah satu katai putih pertama yang ditemukan (1896)
Akan mengembang menjadi raksasa merah dalam sekitar 10 miliar tahun
id.mythology: Procyon adalah 'bintang anjing kecil' dalam astronomi Yunani dan Romawi kuno, mewakili yang lebih kecil dari dua anjing yang mengikuti Orion sang Pemburu — Canis Minor, anjing yang lebih kecil. Namanya secara harfiah berarti 'sebelum anjing', mengacu pada cara ia terbit sedikit sebelum Sirius di langit malam. Dalam astronomi Mesir, kedua bintang anjing — Sirius dan Procyon — adalah penanda musim yang penting. Beberapa sumber kuno mengaitkan Canis Minor dengan anjing Maera, milik Icarius, seorang manusia fana yang diajarkan Dionysus membuat anggur.

en.description: Altair is the brightest star in the constellation Aquila (the Eagle) and the twelfth-brightest star in the night sky, located just 16.7 light-years from Earth. It is one of the closest naked-eye stars to our solar system. Altair spins extraordinarily fast — completing one rotation every 9 hours compared to the Sun's 25 days — causing it to bulge noticeably at the equator. This rapid rotation makes it about 20% wider at the equator than at the poles. Altair is one of the three stars forming the Summer Triangle asterism, along with Vega and Deneb.
facts: Twelfth-brightest star in the night sky at magnitude 0.77
Distance: only 16.7 light-years — one of the closest stars to Earth
Rotates once every 9 hours — extremely fast, causing ~20% equatorial bulge
One of the three stars of the Summer Triangle asterism with Vega and Deneb
About 1.8 times the mass of the Sun and 11 times more luminous
Altair's rapid spin was directly imaged in 2006, revealing its flattened shape
Spectral type A7V — a young, hot main-sequence star
Name derives from Arabic 'al-nasr al-tair' — the flying eagle
en.mythology: Altair's name comes from Arabic 'al-nasr al-tair', meaning 'the flying eagle'. In the constellation Aquila, Altair represents the eye of the eagle. In Greek mythology, Aquila was the eagle that carried Zeus's thunderbolts and also abducted Ganymede to serve as cupbearer to the gods. In East Asian mythology, Altair (known as Niulang, the Cowherd) is the male protagonist of the Qixi love story — separated from Vega (Zhinü, the Weaver Girl) by the Milky Way, allowed to reunite only once a year on the seventh day of the seventh month. This story is celebrated as the Qixi Festival, often called the Chinese Valentine's Day.

id.description: Altair adalah bintang paling terang di konstelasi Aquila (Elang) dan bintang paling terang kedua belas di langit malam, terletak hanya 16,7 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Altair berputar dengan luar biasa cepat — menyelesaikan satu rotasi setiap 9 jam dibanding Matahari yang 25 hari — menyebabkannya menggelembung terlihat di ekuator. Rotasi cepat ini membuatnya sekitar 20% lebih lebar di ekuator dibanding di kutub. Altair adalah salah satu dari tiga bintang yang membentuk asterisma Segitiga Musim Panas bersama Vega dan Deneb.
facts: Bintang paling terang kedua belas di langit malam pada magnitudo 0,77
Jarak: hanya 16,7 tahun cahaya — salah satu bintang terdekat dari Bumi
Berotasi sekali setiap 9 jam — sangat cepat, menyebabkan penggelembungan ekuatorial ~20%
Salah satu dari tiga bintang Segitiga Musim Panas bersama Vega dan Deneb
Sekitar 1,8 kali massa Matahari dan 11 kali lebih terang
Rotasi cepat Altair berhasil dicitrakan langsung pada 2006, mengungkap bentuk pipihnya
Tipe spektral A7V — bintang deret utama muda yang panas
Nama berasal dari bahasa Arab 'al-nasr al-tair' — elang yang terbang
id.mythology: Nama Altair berasal dari bahasa Arab 'al-nasr al-tair', berarti 'elang yang terbang'. Dalam konstelasi Aquila, Altair mewakili mata elang. Dalam mitologi Yunani, Aquila adalah elang yang membawa petir Zeus dan juga menculik Ganymede untuk melayani para dewa. Dalam mitologi Asia Timur, Altair (dikenal sebagai Niulang, Gembala Sapi) adalah protagonis pria dalam kisah cinta Qixi — dipisahkan dari Vega (Zhinü, Gadis Penenun) oleh Bima Sakti, hanya diizinkan bersatu sekali setahun pada hari ketujuh bulan ketujuh.

en.description: Aldebaran is the brightest star in the constellation Taurus and the fourteenth-brightest star in the night sky, located 65.3 light-years from Earth. It is an orange giant star about 44 times the diameter of the Sun and approximately 518 times more luminous. Aldebaran appears to be part of the Hyades star cluster — the nearest open cluster to Earth — but is actually a foreground star about twice as close. Its distinctive reddish-orange color and its position as the 'eye of the bull' in Taurus make it one of the most recognizable stars in winter skies. Aldebaran is one of the four 'royal stars' of ancient Persian astronomy.
facts: Brightest star in Taurus, fourteenth-brightest in the night sky at magnitude 0.85
Orange giant ~44 times the Sun's diameter and ~518 times more luminous
Distance: 65.3 light-years — appears in the Hyades cluster but is actually in the foreground
One of the four 'royal stars' of ancient Persian astronomy (Aldebaran, Regulus, Antares, Fomalhaut)
Marks the eye of Taurus the Bull in the constellation
NASA's Pioneer 10 spacecraft is heading in the direction of Aldebaran
Name means 'the follower' in Arabic — it follows the Pleiades star cluster across the sky
Will eventually expand into a red giant and may engulf planets in its system
en.mythology: Aldebaran's name comes from Arabic 'al-dabarān', meaning 'the follower', because it appears to follow the Pleiades star cluster as they move across the sky. In ancient Persian astronomy, Aldebaran was one of the four 'royal stars' — guardians of the sky — associated with the archangel Michael and representing the vernal equinox around 3000 BCE. In Greek mythology, Taurus represented the bull form Zeus took when he abducted the Phoenician princess Europa, carrying her across the sea to Crete. Aldebaran, as the fiery eye of this divine bull, was particularly prominent. The ancient Egyptians, Babylonians, and Romans all assigned great significance to this star in their astronomical and astrological traditions.

id.description: Aldebaran adalah bintang paling terang di konstelasi Taurus dan bintang paling terang keempat belas di langit malam, terletak 65,3 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah bintang raksasa oranye sekitar 44 kali diameter Matahari dan sekitar 518 kali lebih terang. Aldebaran tampak seperti bagian dari gugus bintang Hyades — gugus terbuka terdekat dari Bumi — tetapi sebenarnya adalah bintang latar depan yang sekitar dua kali lebih dekat. Warnanya yang khas oranye-kemerahan menjadikannya salah satu bintang paling mudah dikenali.
facts: Bintang paling terang di Taurus, paling terang keempat belas di langit malam pada magnitudo 0,85
Raksasa oranye ~44 kali diameter Matahari dan ~518 kali lebih terang
Jarak: 65,3 tahun cahaya — tampak di gugus Hyades tetapi sebenarnya bintang latar depan
Salah satu dari empat 'bintang kerajaan' astronomi Persia kuno
Menandai mata Taurus sang Banteng di konstelasi
Wahana Pioneer 10 milik NASA sedang menuju arah Aldebaran
Nama berarti 'sang pengikut' dalam bahasa Arab — ia mengikuti gugus Pleiades melintasi langit
Akhirnya akan mengembang menjadi raksasa merah dan mungkin menelan planet-planet di sistemnya
id.mythology: Nama Aldebaran berasal dari bahasa Arab 'al-dabarān', berarti 'sang pengikut', karena tampak mengikuti gugus bintang Pleiades melintasi langit. Dalam astronomi Persia kuno, Aldebaran adalah salah satu dari empat 'bintang kerajaan' — penjaga langit — dikaitkan dengan malaikat agung Michael. Dalam mitologi Yunani, Taurus melambangkan bentuk banteng yang diambil Zeus saat ia menculik putri Fenisia Europa. Aldebaran, sebagai mata menyala-nyala banteng ilahi ini, sangat menonjol. Orang Mesir kuno, Babilonia, dan Romawi semuanya memberikan makna besar pada bintang ini.

en.description: Antares is the brightest star in the constellation Scorpius and one of the largest stars visible to the naked eye, a red supergiant located about 550 light-years from Earth. Its name literally means 'rival of Mars' in Greek, because its reddish color and brightness closely resemble the planet Mars. Antares is massive — roughly 700 times the diameter of the Sun — and if placed at the center of our solar system, it would extend beyond the orbit of Mars. Like Betelgeuse, Antares is nearing the end of its life and will eventually explode as a supernova. It has a blue-green companion star, Antares B, which is visible through telescopes.
facts: Brightest star in Scorpius; name means 'rival of Mars' due to similar red color
Red supergiant ~700 times the Sun's diameter — one of the largest known stars
Distance: ~550 light-years from Earth
Has a blue-green companion star, Antares B, visible through a telescope
One of the four 'royal stars' of ancient Persian astronomy
Will eventually explode as a Type II supernova
Surface temperature ~3,400 K — much cooler than the Sun
Antares is semi-regular variable — its brightness changes over ~1,700-day cycles
en.mythology: Antares's name comes from the Greek 'anti-Ares', meaning 'rival of Ares (Mars)', because the star's vivid red color so closely mimics the appearance of Mars that ancient observers sometimes confused the two. In ancient Persian astronomy, Antares was one of the four 'royal stars' — along with Aldebaran, Regulus, and Fomalhaut — serving as guardians of the sky and associated with the seasons. Antares was linked to the archangel Uriel and marked the autumnal equinox around 3000 BCE. In Polynesian cultures, Antares was an important navigational star and appeared in many traditional sky stories. The Scorpius constellation containing Antares was placed opposite Orion in the sky in the Greek myth, so the scorpion that killed Orion would never be seen at the same time as the hunter.

id.description: Antares adalah bintang paling terang di konstelasi Scorpius dan salah satu bintang terbesar yang terlihat mata telanjang, sebuah supergiant merah sekitar 550 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Namanya secara harfiah berarti 'saingan Mars' dalam bahasa Yunani, karena warna kemerahan dan kecerahannya sangat menyerupai planet Mars. Antares sangat masif — sekitar 700 kali diameter Matahari — dan jika ditempatkan di pusat tata surya kita, ia akan membentang melampaui orbit Mars. Seperti Betelgeuse, Antares mendekati akhir hidupnya dan akhirnya akan meledak sebagai supernova.
facts: Bintang paling terang di Scorpius; namanya berarti 'saingan Mars' karena warna merah yang serupa
Supergiant merah ~700 kali diameter Matahari — salah satu bintang terbesar yang diketahui
Jarak: ~550 tahun cahaya dari Bumi
Memiliki bintang pendamping biru-hijau, Antares B, terlihat melalui teleskop
Salah satu dari empat 'bintang kerajaan' astronomi Persia kuno
Akhirnya akan meledak sebagai supernova Tipe II
Suhu permukaan ~3.400 K — jauh lebih dingin dari Matahari
Antares adalah variabel semi-reguler — kecerahannya berubah dalam siklus ~1.700 hari
id.mythology: Nama Antares berasal dari bahasa Yunani 'anti-Ares', berarti 'saingan Ares (Mars)', karena warna merah cerah bintang ini sangat mirip penampilan Mars sehingga pengamat kuno kadang membingungkan keduanya. Dalam astronomi Persia kuno, Antares adalah salah satu dari empat 'bintang kerajaan' — bersama Aldebaran, Regulus, dan Fomalhaut — sebagai penjaga langit. Konstelasi Scorpius yang mengandung Antares ditempatkan berlawanan dengan Orion di langit dalam mitos Yunani, sehingga kalajengking yang membunuh Orion tidak akan pernah terlihat bersamaan dengan sang pemburu.

en.description: Bellatrix is the third-brightest star in the constellation Orion and the twenty-seventh brightest star in the night sky, marking the left shoulder of the Hunter. It is a hot blue giant star about 8.6 times the mass of the Sun and approximately 9,200 times more luminous. Bellatrix is one of the hotter naked-eye stars, with a surface temperature around 22,000 K. Its name comes from Latin meaning 'female warrior' or 'Amazon star'. Despite appearing bright, Bellatrix will have a relatively short lifespan compared to Sun-like stars, eventually ending as a neutron star or black hole after a supernova explosion.
facts: Twenty-seventh brightest star in the night sky at magnitude 1.64
Hot blue giant ~8.6 times the Sun's mass and ~9,200 times more luminous
Distance: ~250 light-years from Earth
Surface temperature ~22,000 K — one of the hottest naked-eye stars
Marks the left shoulder (upper right as seen from Earth) of Orion the Hunter
Name means 'female warrior' in Latin — also known as the Amazon Star
Will end its life as a neutron star or black hole after a supernova
Part of the Orion OB1 stellar association — a group of massive hot stars
en.mythology: Bellatrix means 'female warrior' in Latin and was historically known as the 'Amazon Star', associated with feminine martial power. In Greek mythology, Bellatrix marks the left shoulder of Orion, the great hunter. Some medieval Arab astronomers referred to this region of the sky as al-Najid, 'the conqueror'. The name Bellatrix gained modern cultural fame through J.K. Rowling's Harry Potter series, where Bellatrix Lestrange is a powerful, fearsome witch — a fitting name drawn from the star's martial meaning. In classical astrology, Bellatrix was considered one of the 15 Behenian fixed stars, believed to carry special magical properties and associated with the planet Mercury.

id.description: Bellatrix adalah bintang paling terang ketiga di konstelasi Orion dan bintang paling terang ke-27 di langit malam, menandai bahu kiri Sang Pemburu. Ini adalah bintang raksasa biru panas sekitar 8,6 kali massa Matahari dan sekitar 9.200 kali lebih terang. Bellatrix adalah salah satu bintang paling panas yang terlihat mata telanjang, dengan suhu permukaan sekitar 22.000 K. Namanya berasal dari bahasa Latin yang berarti 'pejuang wanita' atau 'bintang Amazon'.

Raksasa biru panas ~8,6 kali massa Matahari dan ~9.200 kali lebih terang
Jarak: ~250 tahun cahaya dari Bumi
Suhu permukaan ~22.000 K — salah satu bintang paling panas yang terlihat mata telanjang
Menandai bahu kiri Orion sang Pemburu
Nama berarti 'pejuang wanita' dalam bahasa Latin — juga dikenal sebagai Bintang Amazon
Akan berakhir sebagai bintang neutron atau lubang hitam setelah supernova
Bagian dari asosiasi bintang Orion OB1 — kelompok bintang panas masif
id.mythology: Bellatrix berarti 'pejuang wanita' dalam bahasa Latin dan secara historis dikenal sebagai 'Bintang Amazon', dikaitkan dengan kekuatan perang feminin. Dalam mitologi Yunani, Bellatrix menandai bahu kiri Orion, sang pemburu agung. Beberapa astronom Arab abad pertengahan merujuk wilayah langit ini sebagai al-Najid, 'sang penakluk'. Nama Bellatrix mendapat ketenaran budaya modern melalui seri Harry Potter karya J.K. Rowling, di mana Bellatrix Lestrange adalah penyihir yang kuat dan menakutkan — nama yang tepat diambil dari makna perang bintang ini.

en.description: Alnitak is the easternmost star of Orion's Belt, located approximately 1,260 light-years from Earth. It is a multiple star system dominated by a hot blue supergiant, Alnitak Aa, which is one of the most luminous stars visible to the naked eye — about 100,000 times more luminous than the Sun. Alnitak is located near the famous Horsehead Nebula (Barnard 33) and the Flame Nebula (NGC 2024), both of which are part of the Orion Molecular Cloud complex. The intense ultraviolet radiation from Alnitak ionizes the surrounding nebulae, causing them to glow. Alnitak is actually a triple star system with three components.

Distance: ~1,260 light-years — one of the more distant naked-eye stars
Triple star system dominated by a blue supergiant ~100,000 times more luminous than the Sun
Located adjacent to the Horsehead Nebula and Flame Nebula
Ultraviolet radiation from Alnitak ionizes and illuminates surrounding nebulae
Alnitak Aa is one of the largest and hottest stars visible to the naked eye
Name means 'the girdle' or 'the belt' in Arabic
Part of Orion OB1 stellar association — a group of massive hot young stars
en.mythology: Alnitak's name comes from Arabic 'al-nitāq', meaning 'the girdle' — referring to its position as part of Orion's Belt. In Greek mythology, the three belt stars (Alnitak, Alnilam, and Mintaka) were sometimes called 'the Three Kings' or 'the Three Magi', a tradition that persisted into Christian Europe where the belt stars were associated with the three wise men of the nativity. In ancient Egypt, the three belt stars of Orion were closely associated with Osiris, god of the afterlife, and the three great pyramids of Giza are famously aligned to mirror the positions of these three stars, reflecting the ancient Egyptian belief that the heavens should be mirrored on Earth.

id.description: Alnitak adalah bintang paling timur dari Sabuk Orion, terletak sekitar 1.260 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah sistem bintang majemuk yang didominasi oleh supergiant biru panas, Alnitak Aa, yang merupakan salah satu bintang paling terang yang terlihat mata telanjang — sekitar 100.000 kali lebih terang dari Matahari. Alnitak terletak dekat dengan Nebula Horsehead dan Nebula Api yang terkenal, keduanya bagian dari kompleks Awan Molekuler Orion. Radiasi ultraviolet intens dari Alnitak mengionisasi nebula di sekitarnya.
facts: Bintang paling timur dari Sabuk Orion pada magnitudo 1,77
Jarak: ~1.260 tahun cahaya — salah satu bintang mata telanjang yang lebih jauh
Sistem bintang tiga yang didominasi supergiant biru ~100.000 kali lebih terang dari Matahari
Terletak berdampingan dengan Nebula Horsehead dan Nebula Api
Radiasi ultraviolet dari Alnitak mengionisasi dan menerangi nebula di sekitarnya
Alnitak Aa adalah salah satu bintang terbesar dan terpanas yang terlihat mata telanjang
Nama berarti 'sabuk' atau 'ikat pinggang' dalam bahasa Arab
Bagian dari asosiasi bintang Orion OB1 — kelompok bintang muda panas yang masif
id.mythology: Nama Alnitak berasal dari bahasa Arab 'al-nitāq', berarti 'sabuk' — merujuk pada posisinya sebagai bagian dari Sabuk Orion. Dalam mitologi Yunani, tiga bintang sabuk (Alnitak, Alnilam, dan Mintaka) kadang disebut 'Tiga Raja' atau 'Tiga Majus'. Di Mesir kuno, tiga bintang sabuk Orion erat dikaitkan dengan Osiris, dewa akhirat, dan tiga piramida besar Giza terkenal disejajarkan untuk mencerminkan posisi ketiga bintang ini, mencerminkan kepercayaan Mesir kuno bahwa langit harus dicerminkan di Bumi.

en.description: Alnilam is the central and brightest star of Orion's Belt, located approximately 2,000 light-years from Earth. It is a blue supergiant of spectral type B0Ia and one of the most luminous stars known — approximately 375,000 times more luminous than the Sun. Alnilam is surrounded by the reflection nebula NGC 1990, which it illuminates with its intense radiation. Despite being the middle belt star, it is actually the most distant of the three, and its immense intrinsic brightness makes it appear comparable to its neighbors. Alnilam is losing mass rapidly through stellar winds and will eventually explode as a supernova.
facts: Central and brightest star of Orion's Belt at magnitude 1.69
Distance: ~2,000 light-years — most distant of the three belt stars
Blue supergiant ~375,000 times more luminous than the Sun
Surrounded by reflection nebula NGC 1990 which it illuminates
Spectral type B0Ia — one of the hottest and most massive stars visible to the naked eye
Rapidly losing mass through powerful stellar winds
Will eventually end its life as a supernova and possibly a neutron star
Name means 'string of pearls' in Arabic — referring to Orion's Belt
en.mythology: Alnilam's name comes from Arabic 'al-nizam', meaning 'string of pearls', referring to the three belt stars of Orion strung together like a necklace. Along with Alnitak and Mintaka, Alnilam forms the iconic three-star belt of Orion, one of the most recognizable asterisms in the sky across virtually every human culture. In ancient Egypt, the three belt stars were aligned with the three pyramids of Giza — Khufu, Khafre, and Menkaure — as the earthly reflection of Osiris's heavenly domain. In medieval Christian tradition, the three belt stars were known as 'the Three Kings' or 'the Three Magi', representing the wise men who visited the infant Jesus, a tradition still used to find the stars in some cultures today.

id.description: Alnilam adalah bintang tengah dan paling terang dari Sabuk Orion, terletak sekitar 2.000 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah supergiant biru bertipe spektral B0Ia dan salah satu bintang paling terang yang diketahui — sekitar 375.000 kali lebih terang dari Matahari. Alnilam dikelilingi oleh nebula refleksi NGC 1990 yang diteranginya. Meski bintang sabuk tengah, ia sebenarnya yang paling jauh dari ketiganya, dan kecerahan intrinsiknya yang luar biasa membuatnya tampak sebanding dengan tetangganya.
facts: Bintang tengah dan paling terang dari Sabuk Orion pada magnitudo 1,69
Jarak: ~2.000 tahun cahaya — paling jauh dari tiga bintang sabuk
Supergiant biru ~375.000 kali lebih terang dari Matahari
Dikelilingi nebula refleksi NGC 1990 yang diteranginya
Tipe spektral B0Ia — salah satu bintang paling panas dan masif yang terlihat mata telanjang
Kehilangan massa dengan cepat melalui angin bintang yang kuat
Akhirnya akan berakhir sebagai supernova dan kemungkinan bintang neutron
Nama berarti 'untaian mutiara' dalam bahasa Arab — merujuk pada Sabuk Orion
id.mythology: Nama Alnilam berasal dari bahasa Arab 'al-nizam', berarti 'untaian mutiara', merujuk pada tiga bintang sabuk Orion yang tersusun seperti kalung. Bersama Alnitak dan Mintaka, Alnilam membentuk sabuk tiga bintang ikonik Orion, salah satu asterisma paling mudah dikenali di hampir setiap budaya manusia. Di Mesir kuno, tiga bintang sabuk disejajarkan dengan tiga piramida Giza sebagai cerminan duniawi wilayah surga Osiris. Dalam tradisi Kristen abad pertengahan, ketiga bintang sabuk dikenal sebagai 'Tiga Raja' atau 'Tiga Majus'.

en.description: Mintaka is the westernmost star of Orion's Belt and the faintest of the three belt stars, located approximately 1,200 light-years from Earth. It lies almost exactly on the celestial equator — rising due east and setting due west from any point on Earth, making it a natural compass for ancient navigators. Mintaka is a multiple star system consisting of at least five components, with the primary being a hot blue giant. Its name comes from Arabic meaning 'the belt' or 'the girdle'. Like its belt companions, Mintaka is part of the Orion OB1 stellar association, a group of massive young hot stars.
facts: Westernmost star of Orion's Belt at magnitude 2.23 — faintest of the three
Distance: ~1,200 light-years from Earth
Lies almost exactly on the celestial equator — rises due east and sets due west globally
Multiple star system with at least five components
Primary component is a hot blue giant of spectral type O9II
Name means 'the belt' or 'the girdle' in Arabic
Part of Orion OB1 association — a group of massive young hot stars
Ancient navigators used Mintaka to determine true east and west directions
en.mythology: Mintaka's Arabic name 'al-mintaqa' means 'the belt' or 'the zone', referring directly to its role in the three-star belt of Orion. Together with Alnitak and Alnilam, Mintaka forms one of the most universally recognized star patterns in human history. In ancient Egypt, the three belt stars were associated with Osiris and aligned with the great pyramids of Giza. Medieval European astronomers called the trio 'Jacob's Staff', 'Peter's Staff', or 'the Three Marys'. Its position on the celestial equator made Mintaka especially valuable to navigators across cultures — Polynesian, Arab, and European sailors all used it to determine cardinal directions while at sea.

id.description: Mintaka adalah bintang paling barat dari Sabuk Orion dan yang paling redup dari ketiga bintang sabuk, terletak sekitar 1.200 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ia terletak hampir tepat di ekuator langit — terbit tepat di timur dan terbenam tepat di barat dari titik manapun di Bumi, menjadikannya kompas alami bagi navigator kuno. Mintaka adalah sistem bintang majemuk yang terdiri dari setidaknya lima komponen, dengan komponen utama berupa raksasa biru panas.

Jarak: ~1.200 tahun cahaya dari Bumi

Sistem bintang majemuk dengan setidaknya lima komponen
Komponen utama adalah raksasa biru panas bertipe spektral O9II
Nama berarti 'sabuk' atau 'ikat pinggang' dalam bahasa Arab
Bagian dari asosiasi Orion OB1 — kelompok bintang muda panas yang masif
Navigator kuno menggunakan Mintaka untuk menentukan arah timur dan barat sejati
id.mythology: Nama Arab Mintaka 'al-mintaqa' berarti 'sabuk' atau 'zona', merujuk langsung pada perannya dalam sabuk tiga bintang Orion. Bersama Alnitak dan Alnilam, Mintaka membentuk salah satu pola bintang yang paling dikenal secara universal dalam sejarah manusia. Di Mesir kuno, tiga bintang sabuk dikaitkan dengan Osiris dan disejajarkan dengan piramida besar Giza. Astronom Eropa abad pertengahan menyebut ketiganya 'Tongkat Yakub' atau 'Tiga Maria'. Posisinya di ekuator langit menjadikan Mintaka sangat berharga bagi navigator Polinesia, Arab, dan Eropa untuk menentukan arah kardinal di laut.

en.description: Shaula is one of the two stars marking the stinger of Scorpius, located at the very tip of the scorpion's curved tail approximately 570 light-years from Earth. It is a blue subgiant star about 5.5 times the mass of the Sun and roughly 35,000 times more luminous. Shaula is actually a triple star system. It is one of the brightest stars in Scorpius and was one of the southern navigational stars used by Polynesian and Arab seafarers. Its name comes from Arabic meaning 'the raised tail', perfectly describing its position at the scorpion's raised, curved stinger.
facts: Marks the stinger of Scorpius at magnitude 1.62 — one of the brightest stars in the constellation
Distance: ~570 light-years from Earth

en.mythology: Shaula's Arabic name 'al-shawla' means 'the raised tail', precisely capturing its position at the tip of the scorpion's upraised stinger. In Greek mythology, Scorpius was the great scorpion sent by the goddess Gaia to kill Orion the Hunter after he boasted he could slay all animals on Earth. Zeus immortalized both hunter and scorpion in the sky but placed them on opposite sides so they would never meet — which is why Orion sets as Scorpius rises. In ancient Mesopotamian astronomy, this region of the sky near the scorpion's tail was considered the entrance to the underworld. The Maori of New Zealand called Scorpius 'te Matau a Maui' — the fishhook of the demigod Maui, who used it to fish up the North Island of New Zealand from the sea.

id.description: Shaula adalah salah satu dari dua bintang yang menandai sengat Scorpius, terletak di ujung ekor melengkung kalajengking sekitar 570 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah bintang subgiant biru sekitar 5,5 kali massa Matahari dan sekitar 35.000 kali lebih terang. Shaula sebenarnya adalah sistem bintang tiga. Ini adalah salah satu bintang paling terang di Scorpius dan merupakan salah satu bintang navigasi selatan yang digunakan oleh pelaut Polinesia dan Arab.

id.mythology: Nama Arab Shaula 'al-shawla' berarti 'ekor yang terangkat', menangkap dengan tepat posisinya di ujung sengat kalajengking yang terangkat. Dalam mitologi Yunani, Scorpius adalah kalajengking agung yang dikirim dewi Gaia untuk membunuh Orion sang Pemburu. Zeus mengabadikan pemburu dan kalajengking di langit tetapi menempatkan mereka di sisi yang berlawanan sehingga mereka tidak pernah bertemu. Dalam tradisi Maori Selandia Baru, Scorpius disebut 'te Matau a Maui' — kail pancing dewa setengah manusia Maui, yang digunakannya untuk memancing Pulau Utara Selandia Baru dari laut.

en.description: Sargas is the third-brightest star in Scorpius, located in the tail of the scorpion approximately 272 light-years from Earth. It is a yellow-white supergiant of spectral type F1II, about 26 times the radius of the Sun and roughly 13,000 times more luminous. Sargas is one of the hotter F-type supergiants and shows slight variability in its light output. Its name is of Sumerian or Babylonian origin — one of the few star names that does not derive from Arabic. Sargas lies in a rich star field toward the center of our galaxy, making the area surrounding it particularly spectacular through binoculars.

en.mythology: Unlike most prominent stars, Sargas has a name of ancient Sumerian or Babylonian origin rather than Arabic. In ancient Mesopotamian astronomy, Scorpius was known as 'GIR.TAB' — the scorpion — and was one of the oldest identified constellations, appearing in Babylonian star catalogs as early as 1200 BCE. The Babylonians associated this region of the sky with the entrance to the underworld, where the sun god Shamash passed each night. In Greek mythology, Scorpius was placed in the sky opposite Orion — the scorpion that killed the great hunter at the request of the goddess Artemis or Gaia, depending on the version. Zeus immortalized both but kept them forever separated, which explains why Scorpius rises in the east as Orion sets in the west.

id.description: Sargas adalah bintang paling terang ketiga di Scorpius, terletak di ekor kalajengking sekitar 272 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah supergiant kuning-putih bertipe spektral F1II, sekitar 26 kali radius Matahari dan sekitar 13.000 kali lebih terang. Namanya berasal dari bahasa Sumeria atau Babilonia — salah satu dari sedikit nama bintang yang tidak berasal dari bahasa Arab. Sargas terletak di medan bintang yang kaya menuju pusat galaksi kita.

id.mythology: Tidak seperti kebanyakan bintang terkemuka, Sargas memiliki nama berusia kuno dari bahasa Sumeria atau Babilonia. Dalam astronomi Mesopotamia kuno, Scorpius dikenal sebagai 'GIR.TAB' — kalajengking — dan merupakan salah satu konstelasi tertua yang diidentifikasi, muncul dalam katalog bintang Babilonia sejak 1200 SM. Orang Babilonia mengaitkan wilayah langit ini dengan pintu masuk dunia bawah. Dalam mitologi Yunani, Scorpius ditempatkan di langit berlawanan dengan Orion — kalajengking yang membunuh pemburu agung itu — dan Zeus mengabadikan keduanya tetapi memisahkan mereka selamanya.

en.description: Dschubba is the central star in the head of Scorpius, positioned between the claws and the heart star Antares, approximately 400 light-years from Earth. It is a hot blue subgiant of spectral type B0.3IV. Dschubba is notable for being a variable star — in 2000 it brightened dramatically by about half a magnitude due to the formation of a circumstellar disk of gas, a phenomenon observed in Be stars. It is part of the Scorpius-Centaurus stellar association. Its name comes from Arabic meaning 'the forehead' of the scorpion.

en.mythology: Dschubba's name comes from Arabic 'al-jabhah', meaning 'the forehead', referring to its position at the head of Scorpius. In ancient Mesopotamian star lore, the head of Scorpius was associated with the transition point between the living world and the underworld. The Babylonians called Scorpius 'GIR.TAB' and associated this constellation with death, transformation, and the scorpion-men who guarded the gate of the sun god Shamash. In Greek mythology, the scorpion that forms this constellation was sent by Gaia or Artemis to kill Orion, and its placement in the sky opposite Orion ensures the two never appear at the same time — the eternal separation of hunter and his killer.

id.description: Dschubba adalah bintang pusat di kepala Scorpius, terletak antara cakar dan bintang jantung Antares, sekitar 400 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah subgiant biru panas bertipe spektral B0.3IV. Dschubba dikenal sebagai bintang variabel — pada 2000 ia menjadi lebih terang secara dramatis sekitar setengah magnitudo karena pembentukan cakram gas sirkumstelar. Namanya berasal dari bahasa Arab yang berarti 'dahi' kalajengking.

id.mythology: Nama Dschubba berasal dari bahasa Arab 'al-jabhah', berarti 'dahi', merujuk pada posisinya di kepala Scorpius. Dalam lore bintang Mesopotamia kuno, kepala Scorpius dikaitkan dengan titik transisi antara dunia hidup dan dunia bawah. Orang Babilonia menyebut Scorpius 'GIR.TAB' dan mengaitkan konstelasi ini dengan kematian, transformasi, dan manusia kalajengking yang menjaga gerbang dewa matahari Shamash.

en.description: Graffias is a multiple star system representing one of the claws of Scorpius, located approximately 530 light-years from Earth. The brightest component is a hot blue main-sequence star. Graffias is actually one of the finest visual double stars in the sky — its two brightest components can be separated through a small telescope, showing a wide pair of blue-white stars. The name Graffias comes from either Greek or Italian, possibly meaning 'claws'. It is part of the Scorpius-Centaurus stellar association, a large group of young hot stars.

en.mythology: Graffias marks the claws of Scorpius in Greek mythology, the great scorpion that killed Orion the Hunter. In ancient Babylonian astronomy, the claws of the scorpion were originally considered a separate constellation — the scales — which later became Libra. The transition from scorpion's claws to scales reflects a cultural shift in ancient Mesopotamia toward representing justice and balance. In Greek myth, the scorpion was immortalized for defeating the mighty hunter Orion, sent by either the goddess Gaia (angered by Orion's boast to kill all animals) or Artemis (betrayed by her brother Apollo who tricked her into killing Orion). Zeus placed both in the sky on opposite sides so they would never meet again.

id.description: Graffias adalah sistem bintang majemuk yang mewakili salah satu cakar Scorpius, terletak sekitar 530 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Komponen paling terang adalah bintang deret utama biru panas. Graffias sebenarnya adalah salah satu bintang ganda visual terbaik di langit — dua komponen paling terangnya dapat dipisahkan melalui teleskop kecil. Nama Graffias kemungkinan berasal dari bahasa Yunani atau Italia, mungkin berarti 'cakar'.

id.mythology: Graffias menandai cakar Scorpius dalam mitologi Yunani, kalajengking agung yang membunuh Orion sang Pemburu. Dalam astronomi Babilonia kuno, cakar kalajengking awalnya dianggap sebagai konstelasi terpisah — timbangan — yang kemudian menjadi Libra. Transisi dari cakar kalajengking menjadi timbangan mencerminkan pergeseran budaya di Mesopotamia kuno menuju representasi keadilan dan keseimbangan.

en.description: Sheliak is the second-brightest star in Lyra and one of the most famous variable stars in the sky, located about 960 light-years from Earth. It is an eclipsing binary star — the system appears to dim when one star passes in front of the other as seen from Earth. The system consists of a blue-white giant and a smaller companion, orbiting each other every 12.9 days. This eclipsing binary nature was first recognized in 1784, making Sheliak one of the earliest known eclipsing binaries. Its brightness varies by about half a magnitude during each eclipse cycle.

en.mythology: Sheliak's Arabic name means 'the tortoise', referring to the lyre or lute made from a tortoise shell in Greek mythology. In Greek mythology, Lyra represents the lyre of Orpheus, the legendary musician whose music could charm all living things and even move rocks and rivers. Orpheus received the lyre from the god Apollo and became the greatest musician in the world. After his beloved wife Eurydice died from a snake bite, Orpheus descended into the underworld and charmed Hades himself with his music, winning permission to bring Eurydice back — on the condition he not look back while leading her out. Tragically, he looked back at the last moment and lost her forever. After Orpheus was killed by the Maenads, the Muses placed his lyre in the sky as the constellation Lyra.

id.description: Sheliak adalah bintang paling terang kedua di Lyra dan salah satu bintang variabel paling terkenal di langit, terletak sekitar 960 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah bintang biner gerhana — sistemnya tampak meredup saat satu bintang melewati depan bintang lain sebagaimana terlihat dari Bumi. Sistem ini terdiri dari raksasa biru-putih dan pendamping yang lebih kecil, mengorbit satu sama lain setiap 12,9 hari. Sifat biner gerhana ini pertama kali dikenali pada 1784.

id.mythology: Nama Arab Sheliak berarti 'kura-kura', merujuk pada kecapi atau lute yang terbuat dari cangkang kura-kura dalam mitologi Yunani. Dalam mitologi Yunani, Lyra mewakili kecapi Orpheus, musisi legendaris yang musiknya bisa memikat semua makhluk hidup. Setelah istri tercintanya Eurydice meninggal digigit ular, Orpheus turun ke dunia bawah dan memikat Hades sendiri dengan musiknya. Secara tragis, ia menoleh ke belakang di momen terakhir dan kehilangan Eurydice selamanya. Setelah Orpheus dibunuh oleh para Maenad, para Muse menempatkan kecapinya di langit sebagai konstelasi Lyra.

en.description: Sulafat is the third-brightest star in Lyra, forming one corner of the distinctive parallelogram that represents the body of the lyre, located about 620 light-years from Earth. It is a blue-white giant star of spectral type B9III, about 3.5 times the mass of the Sun and roughly 725 times more luminous. Sulafat completes the four-star parallelogram of Lyra along with Sheliak, and together with Vega forms the distinctive shape of the constellation. Its name comes from Arabic meaning 'the tortoise', like Sheliak, connecting both stars to the mythological origin of the lyre.

en.mythology: Sulafat shares its Arabic name meaning 'the tortoise' with Sheliak — both names refer to the ancient Greek myth of how the lyre was invented. According to legend, the god Hermes (Mercury) discovered a tortoise shell and, noticing its resonant properties, strung it with sinew to create the first lyre. He gave this instrument to Apollo, who later passed it to the legendary musician Orpheus. When Orpheus was killed and dismembered by the Maenads, the Muses gathered the pieces of his lyre and placed it in the sky as the constellation Lyra, immortalizing both the instrument and its music. Sulafat and Sheliak, as the tortoise-named stars, preserve this origin story in their very names.

id.description: Sulafat adalah bintang paling terang ketiga di Lyra, membentuk salah satu sudut jajaran genjang khas yang mewakili tubuh kecapi, terletak sekitar 620 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah bintang raksasa biru-putih bertipe spektral B9III, sekitar 3,5 kali massa Matahari dan sekitar 725 kali lebih terang. Sulafat melengkapi jajaran genjang empat bintang Lyra bersama Sheliak, dan bersama Vega membentuk bentuk khas konstelasi ini. Namanya berasal dari bahasa Arab yang berarti 'kura-kura'.

id.mythology: Sulafat berbagi nama Arabnya yang berarti 'kura-kura' dengan Sheliak — kedua nama merujuk pada mitos Yunani kuno tentang bagaimana kecapi ditemukan. Menurut legenda, dewa Hermes menemukan cangkang kura-kura dan, memperhatikan sifat resonansinya, memasang senar untuk menciptakan kecapi pertama. Ia memberikan instrumen ini kepada Apollo, yang kemudian menyerahkannya kepada musisi legendaris Orpheus. Ketika Orpheus dibunuh oleh para Maenad, para Muse menempatkan kecapinya di langit sebagai konstelasi Lyra.

en.description: Delta Lyrae is a red giant star in the constellation Lyra, forming one corner of the distinctive parallelogram that represents the lyre's body, located approximately 740 light-years from Earth. It is a cool red giant of spectral type M4II, with a surface temperature around 3,600 K — much cooler and redder than the blue-white stars that dominate Lyra. Its reddish color contrasts beautifully with the blue-white Vega and other Lyra stars when viewed through binoculars. Delta Lyrae is a semi-regular variable star, showing slight changes in brightness over time.

en.mythology: Delta Lyrae is part of the constellation Lyra, which represents the lyre of Orpheus in Greek mythology. The four stars forming the parallelogram — Sheliak, Sulafat, and the two Delta Lyrae components — represent the frame and strings of the instrument. In the myth, Orpheus was gifted the lyre by Apollo and became the greatest musician who ever lived, his music capable of charming wild beasts, moving rivers, and making stones weep. After his tragic death, the Muses placed his lyre in the heavens. In Arabic astronomy, the parallelogram of Lyra was sometimes envisioned as a tortoise (al-sulahfat), referencing the origin of the lyre from a tortoise shell in the myth of Hermes.

id.description: Delta Lyrae adalah bintang raksasa merah di konstelasi Lyra, membentuk salah satu sudut jajaran genjang khas yang mewakili tubuh kecapi, terletak sekitar 740 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah raksasa merah yang dingin bertipe spektral M4II, dengan suhu permukaan sekitar 3.600 K — jauh lebih dingin dan lebih merah dari bintang biru-putih yang mendominasi Lyra. Warna kemerahannya kontras indah dengan Vega dan bintang-bintang Lyra lainnya saat dilihat melalui binokular.

id.mythology: Delta Lyrae adalah bagian dari konstelasi Lyra, yang mewakili kecapi Orpheus dalam mitologi Yunani. Empat bintang yang membentuk jajaran genjang mewakili rangka dan senar instrumen tersebut. Dalam mitos, Orpheus dihadiahi kecapi oleh Apollo dan menjadi musisi terhebat yang pernah hidup, musiknya mampu memikat binatang buas, menggerakkan sungai, dan membuat batu menangis. Setelah kematiannya yang tragis, para Muse menempatkan kecapinya di langit.

en.description: Mirzam is a blue giant star in Canis Major, located approximately 500 light-years from Earth. It is a Beta Cephei type variable star — its brightness pulsates slightly over a period of about 6 hours due to oscillations in its outer layers. Mirzam lies to the west of the brilliant Sirius and rises before it, which is the origin of its Arabic name meaning 'the herald' or 'the announcer' — it heralded the arrival of Sirius in the ancient night sky. It is about 9 times the mass of the Sun and roughly 26,000 times more luminous.

en.mythology: Mirzam's Arabic name 'al-mirzam' means 'the herald' or 'the roarer', referring to its role as the star that rises before Sirius and announces its coming. In ancient Arabic sky lore, stars that heralded the arrival of important celestial objects were called 'mirzams'. Canis Major as a whole represents the Greater Dog following Orion the Hunter in Greek mythology — the most faithful of Orion's two hunting hounds. Ancient Egyptians gave great importance to this region of the sky, as the rising of Sirius (the dominant star of Canis Major) marked the beginning of their new year and predicted the flooding of the Nile, with Mirzam serving as a preliminary signal.

id.description: Mirzam adalah bintang raksasa biru di Canis Major, terletak sekitar 500 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Ini adalah bintang variabel tipe Beta Cephei — kecerahannya berdenyut sedikit selama sekitar 6 jam karena osilasi di lapisan luarnya. Mirzam terletak di sebelah barat Sirius yang cemerlang dan terbit sebelumnya, yang merupakan asal mula namanya dalam bahasa Arab yang berarti 'sang penyiar' — ia menyiarkan kedatangan Sirius di langit malam kuno.

id.mythology: Nama Arab Mirzam 'al-mirzam' berarti 'sang penyiar' atau 'sang pengaum', merujuk pada perannya sebagai bintang yang terbit sebelum Sirius dan mengumumkan kedatangannya. Dalam lore langit Arab kuno, bintang-bintang yang menyiarkan kedatangan benda langit penting disebut 'mirzam'. Canis Major secara keseluruhan mewakili Anjing Besar yang mengikuti Orion sang Pemburu dalam mitologi Yunani. Orang Mesir kuno memberikan perhatian besar pada wilayah langit ini, dengan Mirzam berfungsi sebagai sinyal awal sebelum terbitnya Sirius.

en.description: Tarazed is an orange bright giant star in the constellation Aquila (the Eagle), located about 461 light-years from Earth. It forms a striking trio with Altair and Alshain, creating the line of three stars that represents the body of the eagle. Tarazed is a luminous K-type star about 2,600 times more luminous than the Sun, with a radius roughly 110 times larger. Its name comes from a Persian phrase meaning 'the beam of the scale' or possibly 'the falcon'. Tarazed's warm orange color contrasts beautifully with the bright white of nearby Altair.

en.mythology: Tarazed is part of the constellation Aquila, the Eagle, in Greek mythology. Aquila was the eagle of Zeus, the king of the gods, who carried his thunderbolts and performed divine tasks. In one famous myth, Aquila abducted the beautiful youth Ganymede from Earth to serve as cupbearer to the gods on Mount Olympus. In East Asian astronomy, the three stars Tarazed, Altair, and Alshain represented the Cowherd (Niulang) in the famous Qixi love story — Altair being the cowherd himself, with Tarazed and Alshain representing his two children carried on either side as he tried to cross the Milky Way to reach the Weaver Girl (Vega). In Persian astronomy, this region was associated with the royal star Vega and the eagle constellation was known as 'the flying eagle'.

Warna oranye hangatnya kontras indah dengan putih cerah Altair di dekatnya.

Dalam mitos terkenal, Aquila menculik pemuda tampan Ganymede dari Bumi untuk melayani para dewa di Olimpus. Dalam astronomi Asia Timur, tiga bintang Tarazed, Altair, dan Alshain mewakili Gembala Sapi (Niulang) dalam kisah cinta Qixi — Altair sebagai gembala itu sendiri, dengan Tarazed dan Alshain mewakili dua anaknya.

en.description: Alshain is a yellow subgiant star in Aquila, located south of the brilliant Altair and forming part of the distinctive three-star line of the eagle constellation. At just 44.7 light-years away, it is one of the closer stars visible to the naked eye. Alshain is a G-type star similar to the Sun but slightly more evolved, having begun to expand off the main sequence. Its name derives from a Persian phrase meaning 'the balance' or 'the falcon'. Alshain has a faint red dwarf companion star orbiting at a wide distance.

en.mythology: Alshain is part of Aquila the Eagle, Zeus's divine messenger and weapon-carrier in Greek mythology. Together with Altair and Tarazed, these three stars form the body of the eagle soaring across the Milky Way. In East Asian astronomy, Alshain and Tarazed flanking Altair represented the two children of Niulang the Cowherd, who carried them on a shoulder pole as he tried to cross the Milky Way to reunite with the Weaver Girl (Vega). The Persian name 'al-shahin' meaning falcon reflects the Arabic and Persian traditions of seeing this constellation as a soaring bird of prey — a symbol of power and divine swiftness across Middle Eastern cultures.

id.description: Alshain adalah bintang subgiant kuning di Aquila, terletak di selatan Altair yang cemerlang dan membentuk garis tiga bintang khas konstelasi elang. en.description: Elnath is the second-brightest star in Taurus and marks the tip of the bull's northern horn, located about 134 light-years from Earth. It is a blue-white giant of spectral type B7III, about 5 times the mass of the Sun and roughly 700 times more luminous. Elnath sits almost exactly on the border between Taurus and Auriga — it was historically shared between both constellations and was once designated as both Beta Tauri and Gamma Aurigae. Its name comes from Arabic meaning 'the butting one', referring to the bull's horns.

en.mythology: Elnath marks the northern horn of Taurus the Bull, one of the oldest constellations in human history. In Greek mythology, Taurus represents the bull form Zeus assumed when he abducted the Phoenician princess Europa, swimming with her on his back to the island of Crete. The constellation's horn stars — Elnath and Zeta Tauri — represent the formidable weapons of the divine bull. In Babylonian astronomy, Taurus was known as 'the bull of heaven' (GUD.AN.NA) and was associated with the god Anu. The Pleiades star cluster within Taurus was considered the bull's shoulder and held enormous agricultural and religious significance across Mesopotamian, Greek, and many other ancient cultures.

id.description: Elnath adalah bintang paling terang kedua di Taurus dan menandai ujung tanduk utara banteng, terletak sekitar 134 tahun cahaya dari Bumi. Elnath terletak hampir tepat di perbatasan antara Taurus dan Auriga — secara historis dibagi antara kedua konstelasi dan pernah ditetapkan sebagai Beta Tauri dan Gamma Aurigae.

Dalam mitologi Yunani, Taurus mewakili bentuk banteng yang diambil Zeus saat ia menculik putri Fenisia Europa. Dalam astronomi Babilonia, Taurus dikenal sebagai 'banteng surga' (GUD.AN.NA) dan dikaitkan dengan dewa Anu. Gugus bintang Pleiades di dalam Taurus dianggap sebagai bahu banteng dan memiliki makna pertanian dan keagamaan yang luar biasa.

en.description: Ain is an orange giant star in Taurus, located within the Hyades star cluster — the nearest open star cluster to Earth at about 150 light-years. Its name means 'eye' in Arabic, referring to its position as one of the eyes of the bull Taurus alongside Aldebaran. Ain is a confirmed exoplanet host — it has a Jupiter-sized planet called Epsilon Tauri b orbiting it. This makes Ain one of the rare naked-eye stars known to host an exoplanet. The Hyades cluster itself is estimated to be about 625 million years old.

en.mythology: Ain is part of the Hyades, one of the most mythologically significant star clusters in history. In Greek mythology, the Hyades were the daughters of Atlas and Aethra, half-sisters of the Pleiades. They were the nymphs who raised the infant Dionysus, god of wine. When their brother Hyas was killed by a lion, the Hyades wept so inconsolably that Zeus placed them in the sky as a star cluster. Their rising and setting was associated with rain in ancient Greece — the word 'Hyades' may derive from 'hyein' meaning 'to rain'. Ain specifically, as one of the bull's eyes, was part of the broader mythology of Taurus, representing Zeus in bull form who abducted Europa.

id.description: Ain adalah bintang raksasa oranye di Taurus, terletak di dalam gugus bintang Hyades — gugus bintang terbuka terdekat dari Bumi sekitar 150 tahun cahaya. Namanya berarti 'mata' dalam bahasa Arab, merujuk pada posisinya sebagai salah satu mata banteng Taurus bersama Aldebaran. Ain adalah bintang yang terkonfirmasi memiliki exoplanet — planet seukuran Jupiter bernama Epsilon Tauri b yang mengorbitinya.

Dalam mitologi Yunani, Hyades adalah putri-putri Atlas dan Aethra, saudara tiri para Pleiades. Mereka adalah nimfa yang membesarkan bayi Dionysus, dewa anggur. Ketika saudara laki-laki mereka Hyas dibunuh singa, Hyades menangis tak henti-hentinya sehingga Zeus menempatkan mereka di langit sebagai gugus bintang. Kemunculan mereka dikaitkan dengan hujan di Yunani kuno.

en.description: Hyadum is a yellow giant star in Taurus, one of the brightest members of the Hyades cluster and historically significant as a leading star of this ancient star group. Located about 154 light-years away, it is a G-type giant that has evolved off the main sequence. The Hyades is the nearest open star cluster to Earth and serves as the first 'rung' of the cosmic distance ladder — distances to farther objects are calibrated using the Hyades as a reference. The cluster's V-shape, with Hyadum at its point, was one of the most recognized patterns in ancient skies.

en.mythology: Hyadum is one of the Hyades — in Greek mythology, a group of nymph half-sisters of the Pleiades, daughters of the Titan Atlas and Aethra. The Hyades raised the infant god Dionysus on Mount Nysa after his mother Semele was killed by Zeus's lightning. When their beloved brother Hyas was killed by a lion or boar while hunting, the sisters wept so bitterly that Zeus transformed them into stars to immortalize their grief. Their name in Greek may be related to 'hyein' (to rain), because their rising and setting in ancient times coincided with rainy seasons. The V-shaped Hyades asterism was one of the most important weather indicators for ancient Greek and Roman farmers.

id.description: Hyadum adalah bintang raksasa kuning di Taurus, salah satu anggota paling terang dari gugus Hyades dan secara historis penting sebagai bintang terdepan kelompok bintang kuno ini. Terletak sekitar 154 tahun cahaya jauhnya, ini adalah raksasa tipe G yang telah berevolusi dari deret utama. Hyades adalah gugus bintang terbuka terdekat dari Bumi dan berfungsi sebagai 'anak tangga' pertama dari tangga jarak kosmik.

Para Hyades membesarkan bayi dewa Dionysus di Gunung Nysa setelah ibunya Semele terbunuh oleh petir Zeus. Ketika saudara laki-laki tercinta mereka Hyas terbunuh oleh singa saat berburu, para saudari menangis begitu sedih sehingga Zeus mengubah mereka menjadi bintang untuk mengabadikan kesedihan mereka.

en.description: Avior is one of the brightest stars in the southern constellation Carina (the Keel), located approximately 630 light-years from Earth. It is a multiple star system — the primary is a cool orange giant of spectral type K3III, while its companion is a hot blue-white B-type star. This makes Avior a contrasting color binary system. Avior is one of the stars used for navigation by southern hemisphere seafarers and was important for celestial navigation before GPS. Despite its brilliance, Avior has no traditional name in ancient Arabic or Greek star lists — its current name was assigned by the British Nautical Almanac Office in the 20th century for navigational purposes.
